title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at ECIL

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at ECIL
jsonLd.description:
ECIL, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Coimbatore operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About ECIL:
ECIL is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ECIL!
